creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 200821
Diff to be applied for mkdesktop 3.2 to update to version 3.3

mkdesktop is being updated again, for what I hope is the final release for a while. kld management has been sanitised as per the current protocol, and some other improvements have also been incorporated - chiefly ensuring all normal users get added to the video group.
